---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: false
---

[Download PDF](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}

---

## Ruggero Cortini

*Data Scientist · Biophysicist · Consultant*
ruggero.cortini@gmail.com

---

## Summary

<!-- Replace with your own summary -->

Data scientist and consultant with a PhD in biophysics and experience spanning academic
research, management consulting, and applied ML engineering. Specialised in translating
complex scientific and business problems into robust data solutions for pharma and biotech
organisations.

---

## Experience

### *[Current Role]* — *[Company]*
*[Start] – present*

- *[Key responsibility or achievement]*
- *[Key responsibility or achievement]*
- *[Key responsibility or achievement]*

### *[Previous Role]* — *[Company]*
*[Start] – [End]*

- *[Key responsibility or achievement]*
- *[Key responsibility or achievement]*

---

## Education

### PhD, Biophysics — *[Institution]*
*[Year]*
Thesis: *[Title]*

### *[Degree]* — *[Institution]*
*[Year]*

---

## Skills

| Category | Technologies |
|----------|-------------|
| Languages | Python · R · SQL · Julia |
| ML / AI | scikit-learn · PyTorch · LangChain · Hugging Face |
| Data engineering | dbt · Airflow · Spark |
| Cloud | AWS · GCP |
| Tools | Git · Docker · Quarto |

---

## Publications

*[List key publications, or link to your Google Scholar / ORCID profile]*
